name: Faux Stuffed Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice eggs in half lengthwise and carefully remove and discard yolks.
2. Position the knife blade in a food processor bowl.
3. Add beans and the next three ingredients to the food processor.
4. Process until smooth.
5. Spoon the mixture into a decorating bag fitted with a large star tip.
6. Pipe the mixture into egg cavities.
7. Top evenly with caviar.
Yield: 28 appetizers (serving size: 1 stuffed egg half)
Nutrition: 28 calories, 0.4 g fat, 4 mg cholesterol, 74 mg sodium
